signals.title: Online Safety Amendment (Social Media Minimum Age) Act 2024
signals.summary: This Act establishes a minimum age of 16 for access to certain age-restricted social media platforms and requires platforms to implement age verification measures. It aims to protect minors from online harms.
key_provisions: Establishes a minimum age of 16 for social media access

signals.title: Family Law Amendment (Information Sharing) Bill 2023
signals.summary: This bill amends the Family Law Act 1975 to enhance information sharing between family law courts and child protection systems, aiming to promote the safety and well-being of children affected by family violence and abuse.
key_provisions: Enhances information sharing between family law courts and child protection systems

signals.title: Family Law Regulations 2024
signals.summary: These regulations prescribe specific state and territory laws related to child welfare and aim to harmonize family law regulations nationwide.
key_provisions: Prescribes state and territory laws related to child welfare
Aims to harmonize family law regulations

signals.title: Privacy and Other Legislation Amendment Bill 2024
signals.summary: This bill requires the OAIC to develop a Children's Online Privacy Code to strengthen privacy protections for children online.
key_provisions: Requires development of a Children's Online Privacy Code

signals.title: Online Safety Industry Standards
signals.summary: These standards mandate tech companies to tackle harmful online content, including child sexual abuse material, applying to various online services.
key_provisions: Applies to file and photo storage services, chat and messaging services

signals.title: Age Verification Roadmap
signals.summary: Developed by the eSafety Commissioner, this roadmap explores age verification and complementary measures to protect children from online harms.
key_provisions: Aims to protect children from online harms
